name: Underbed Storage Tan - Brightroom™
description:
Store clothing, bedding and other essentials under the bed with the Underbed Storage from Brightroom™. This tan storage features a clear top to help you easily see the contents. It's made of plastic and has a zipper closure to help keep the contents nicely contained, while the side handles make it easy to move.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
